message:
fix(security): replace last pipe-delimited signature hash in verifier_sdk with length-prefixed encoding

Extract compute_verifier_signature() helper with proper length-prefixed
field encoding, replacing the remaining format!("{id}|{hash}") patterns
in verify_claim, verify_migration_artifact, and verify_trust_state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
